title: poa pratensis f. minor
intro: Poa pratensis f. minor, also known as lesser meadow-grass or dwarf meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the perennial Poa pratensis plant, typically found in temperate regions with moist soils. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Poa pratensis f. minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
